title: Fix all hardcoded secrets in prod.exs
prompt: `test_fixtures/hardcoded_prod_secrets.ex` is a `prod.exs` with FOUR hardcoded secrets: `secret_key_base`, DB password, Stripe publishable+secret keys, and SendGrid API key. Move all of them to a `runtime.exs` that uses `System.fetch_env!/1` for each value. The DB URL should come from a single `DATABASE_URL` env var. Write the fix to `config/runtime.exs` (not `prod.exs`). Every secret should be read from env at runtime, and none should appear as a string literal.
tier_rationale: Four related hardcoded secrets; each fix is mechanical but requires catching all four.
